raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has two tribes that have declared a state of emergency because of violence against their tribal members.",
    "The Round Valley Indian Tribes declared a state of emergency in April after two members were found murdered.",
    "The Yurok Tribe declared a state of emergency in December 2021 as a response to violence against Native Americans.",
    "Seven women reported being approached by possible traffickers in Humboldt County.",
    "The case of Emmilee Risling, reported missing in October 2021, remains unsolved.",
    "The Yurok Tribe has been at the forefront in confronting the crisis of missing and murdered Indigenous people.",
    "Participants from a summit called for the implementation of a public notification alert when Native Americans go missing, similar to the AMBER Alert.",
    "The 2022 'Feather Alert' law was authored by Assemblymember James C. Ramos."
  ]
}
```
